DEBUG-CHAIN-ESTABLISH.summary: Debug-only orchestrator for chain replication. Given a session id, the per-follower landing-pool size, and an ordered list of (host, port) pairs for the followers, drive two passes: CHAIN-PREP each follower in order, then CHAIN-WIRE each with predecessor + successor info. Removed once registerWorkerThread invokes the orchestrator directly.
DEBUG-CHAIN-ESTABLISH.complexity: O(N) RPCs where N is the follower count.
